recent_excerpts: CVE-2026-5760, a critical 9.8 CVSS flaw in the SGLang inference engine, allows attackers to execute arbitrary code by uploading malicious GGUF model files, compromising AI/ML serving deployments.
Qualys warns that AI agents like Claude Mythos can cut vulnerability discovery time from months to hours, compressing the patch window and overwhelming security teams with a surge of new CVEs.

Anthropic restricts access to its Claude Mythos Preview AI model, citing its ability to automate vulnerability discovery and exploit chain creation, and launches Project Glasswing to find and patch fl
